meta.professor_methodology: Focus on cash flow diagrams and equivalence concepts
meta.description: Foundation of engineering economics - understanding that money has time value and equivalent values at different times

patterns.name: Future Worth of Lump Sum
patterns.recognition_signal: Single amount growing to future date
patterns.logic: Compound interest grows present amount forward in time

patterns.name: Present Worth of Lump Sum
patterns.logic: Discount future amount back to present value

decision_tree.question: Are you moving forward or backward in time?
Is it a single amount or series?

professor_tips: Always draw cash flow diagram first
Verify your answer makes sense (F > P for positive i)

confidence_checklist: I can draw cash flow diagrams correctly
I know when to use F/P vs P/F
I can convert between nominal and effective rates
I understand the time value concept intuitively
